series_metadata.series_title: Payment Batch Reports and pay-ins forms (for CPIM revenue)
series_metadata.series_description: Reports that list and document revenue received by the CPIM program as payment for certification and program registration fees. Such revenue is delivered to and deposited through the Treasurer of State''s Revenue Management department, and is accompanied by a pay-in form.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retained by CPIM for one calendar year following the conclusion of the fiscal year for which the corresponding revenue is deposited through the Treasurer of State''s Revenue Management department, provided that an audit report issued by the Auditor of State for the Treasurer of State for the corresponding time period has been issued., Paper: Shred
